Columns.Name: 請求_登録内容確認中件数
請求_発注書回収待ち件数
請求_計上確定待ち件数

ExternalDatabaseInfo.CreateViewSql:
SELECT count(
        CASE
            WHEN (((suba.contents_checking_flg = 1) OR (subb.contents_checking_flg = 1)) AND (sub.operation_complete_flg = 1)) THEN 1
            ELSE NULL::integer
        END) AS "請求_登録内容確認中件数",
    count(
        CASE
            WHEN (suba.purchase_collect_wait_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE NULL::integer
        END) AS "請求_発注書回収待ち件数",
    count(
        CASE
            WHEN ((suba.account_confirm_wait_flg = 1) OR (subb.account_confirm_wait_flg = 1)) THEN 1
            ELSE NULL::integer
        END) AS "請求_計上確定待ち件数"
   FROM ((((t_object_product main
     JOIN t_object_product_ext sub ON ((main.object_product_ext_id = sub.object_product_ext_id)))
     JOIN t_object_order subc ON ((main.object_order_id = subc.object_order_id)))
     LEFT JOIN m_account_status suba ON ((main.sales_account_status_id = suba.account_status_id)))
     LEFT JOIN m_account_status subb ON (((main.purchase_account_status_id = subb.account_status_id) AND ((suba.contents_checking_flg = 1) OR (subb.contents_checking_flg = 1) OR (suba.purchase_collect_wait_flg = 1) OR (suba.account_confirm_wait_flg = 1) OR (subb.account_confirm_wait_flg = 1)))))
  WHERE (subc.active_flg = 1);
